All files look correct. Here's a summary of what was done:

**Centralized all versions** in `Directory.Build.props` — no more hardcoded versions scattered across projects:

| Package | Before | After |
|---------|--------|-------|
| System.Text.Json | 8.0.5 / 9.0.0 / 10.0.1 (3 different!) | **10.0.5** (unified) |
| Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.19.0 / 12.24.0 | **12.27.0** (unified) |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 | **10.0.5** |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | 8.0.1 | **10.0.5** |
| AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson (net8.0) | 8.0.11 | **8.0.25** |
| OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | 1.15.0 | **1.15.1** |
| xunit / NewtonsoftJson (net6.0) | — | Already latest |

**Key changes:**
- Every `PackageReference` now uses `$(PropertyName)` instead of inline versions
- `Common.props` uses `$(LoggingVersion)` instead of a hardcoded version
- Legacy's hardcoded `Azure.Storage.Blobs 12.19.0` now uses the shared `$(BlobsVersion)`
- All version drift is eliminated — one place to update going forward
